creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 182875
patch to the ports tree

The attached patch updates devel/visualparadigm to version 14.1 build 20170519.


Tons of new features and updates. From the website:

- Project Management Lifecycle Navigator
- Project Management Step-by-Step
- Incremental update of project data

...

- Q/A
 * portlint -AC OK
 * poudriere builds for {10.3,11.0}{i386,amd64} OK

*I would like to step up if there are any committers willing to mentor me*
